message:
refactor(share): consolidate duplicate git_remote_url + find_ancestor_path into a new share::git module

share::hosting and share::detection each carried their own private
copies of `git_remote_url(dir: &Path) -> Option<String>` and
`find_ancestor_path(start: &Path, name: &str) -> Option<PathBuf>`.
Both copies were byte-identical and both carried the same TODO
comment noting the duplication — `br-8ujfs.4.1 (D1): … Duplicate of
share::hosting::git_remote_url — scheduled for consolidation in a
follow-up.` / `There's a duplicate helper in share::detection with
the same name and body; TODO consolidate into a shared share::git
helper module as a follow-up cleanup bead.`.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-share/src/git.rs (new)
- Single home for both helpers:
  * `pub fn git_remote_url(dir: &Path) -> Option<String>` — routes
    through `mcp_agent_mail_core::git_cmd::GitCmd` so per-repo
    locking is honoured (br-8ujfs.4.1 D1) and returns the trimmed
    `git remote get-url origin` output, or None on missing/empty/non-
    zero.
  * `pub fn find_ancestor_path(start: &Path, name: &str) -> Option<PathBuf>`
    — walks ancestor directories (honouring crate::is_real_file /
    crate::is_real_dir for the seed) and returns the first ancestor
    that has a `name` child whose file_type is file or dir.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-share/src/lib.rs
- `pub mod git;` registers the new module alongside the existing
  siblings.
- One incidental formatting tweak: collapse the
  `let project_scope = manifest_root.get("project_scope").and_then(Value::as_object);`
  binding onto a single line (rustfmt was already producing this
  shape; no semantic change).

crates/mcp-agent-mail-share/src/hosting.rs
- Drop the private `git_remote_url` + `find_ancestor_path` definitions.
- Replace every call site (`git_remote_url(output_dir)`,
  `find_ancestor_path(output_dir, ".github/workflows")`,
  `find_ancestor_path(output_dir, "wrangler.toml")`,
  `find_ancestor_path(output_dir, "netlify.toml")`,
  `find_ancestor_path(output_dir, "scripts")`) with
  `crate::git::…` qualified calls.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-share/src/detection.rs
- Same treatment: drop the private helpers and rewrite every call
  site (`git_remote_url(cwd)`, five `find_ancestor_path` sites)
  through `crate::git::…`.

Pure refactor — no behavior change. Removes two copies of the same
code, so future changes to git-remote / ancestor-path lookup have a
single place to land.
